name: 灰烬使者
description: 对一格以内的一个敌人造成自身攻击力100%的真实伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 1, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) { return target; } const damage = caster.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(caster, target, damage, 'true', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: caster.name + '使用灰烬使者对' + target.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点真实伤害', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '对1格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点真实伤害（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }
